items.title: Validation curve and stop point
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  epochAxis["epochs 1 to N"]
  valCurve["val metric: improves then worsens"]
  bestEpoch["best epoch k"]
  stopEpoch["stop at k plus patience"]
  epochAxis --> valCurve
  valCurve --> bestEpoch
  bestEpoch --> stopEpoch
items.caption: Training continues past the best validation epoch until patience expires — then restore weights from epoch k, not the stop epoch.

items.title: Early stopping decision loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  trainEpoch["train one epoch or round"]
  evalVal["evaluate on validation set"]
  beatBest{"val metric beats best?"}
  saveCheckpoint["save best checkpoint"]
  resetPatience["reset patience counter"]
  incPatience["increment patience counter"]
  hitPatience{"patience exhausted?"}
  restoreBest["restore best weights and stop"]
  trainEpoch --> evalVal --> beatBest
  beatBest -->|yes| saveCheckpoint --> resetPatience --> trainEpoch
  beatBest -->|no| incPatience --> hitPatience
  hitPatience -->|no| trainEpoch
  hitPatience -->|yes| restoreBest
items.caption: Each evaluation pass compares validation performance to the running best; patience counts consecutive non-improving passes.

items.title: Train vs validation divergence
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  trainLoss["train loss keeps falling"]
  valLoss["val loss flat or rising"]
  overfitSignal["overfitting signal"]
  earlyStop["early stopping triggers"]
  trainLoss --> overfitSignal
  valLoss --> overfitSignal
  overfitSignal --> earlyStop
items.caption: When train and validation curves diverge, continuing training hurts generalization — early stopping halts before the gap widens further.

items.title: Restore best weights vs last epoch
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  lastWeights["weights at stop epoch"]
  bestWeights["weights at best val epoch"]
  deployWrong["deploy overfit final weights"]
  deployRight["deploy best checkpoint"]
  lastWeights --> deployWrong
  bestWeights --> deployRight
items.caption: Without restore best weights, the model at stop time is often worse than the checkpoint saved at peak validation performance.
